reviews.comment:
Siempre paro cuando vuelvo, cargo nafta, cargo el termo,
Buena atención. Sigo con el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
I always stop on my way back, fill up with gas, refill my thermos.
Good service. I continue my trip.

reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar y agradecer a Juan Ramón y Fernando que trabajan en la estación, por la excelente ayuda desinteresada que tuvieron conmigo y mi familia, al quedarse mi auto viniendo de Mar del Plata a Bs. As. Muy buena gente, vale la pena parar en la estación! Mil Gracias de nuestra parte! Dios los bendiga

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight and thank Juan Ramón and Fernando, who work at the station, for the excellent and selfless help they gave me and my family when my car broke down on the way from Mar del Plata to Buenos Aires. They are very kind people; it's definitely worth stopping at the station! Many thanks from us! God bless them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NjZYWTlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación sobre Rura 2 . No posee  carga de GNC. Excelente atención de sus playeros.  Agua y carga de aire sin costo. Baños limpios pero algo descuidados. En el mini market pica variedad. Rico cafe

(Translated by Google)
Gas station on Route 2. No CNG refueling. Excellent service from the attendants. Free water and air conditioning. Clean restrooms, but somewhat neglected. The mini-market has a good selection of snacks. Delicious coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2azhmbWpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar el parque para estacionar. Finde largo, SOLO EFECTIVO - EXCUSA sin  internet . Mala atención , poca mercadería, baños sucios. Único objetivo juntar $$$ de los turistas.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to park. Long weekend, CASH ONLY - EXCUSE: no internet. Poor service, limited merchandise, dirty bathrooms. Their sole objective is to make money from tourists.
